decisions_session_2.decision: @sentry/react deve ser versão exata sem ^ no package.json
decisions_session_2.rationale: check-siblings.js do @sentry/capacitor lê o spec do package.json e rejeita range semver. Descoberto via build #28 failure log.

decisions_this_session.rationale: Build #27 with Story 1.2 selector fix failed on device (zero points). Selector fix was necessary but not sufficient.
Avoid wasting 2-4h swap work if the real issue is permission/buffer/backend, not the plugin itself. Cost ~30min, eliminates ambiguity.
app/package.json confirms @capacitor/core@^8.2.0, @capacitor/ios@^8.3.0 — already on Capacitor 8. Previous handoff was wrong saying 'Capacitor 7 with sed patch'.

decisions_this_session.decision: Root cause hypothesis for build #27 failure
decisions_this_session.rationale: Capacitor 8.0.2+ moved call.getString/getBool/reject/resolve behind $NonescapableTypes Swift experimental feature flag (issue ionic-team/capacitor#8333). @capacitor-community plugin uses these at Plugin.swift:90/93/106/156/219 — likely fails silently. @capgo fork is rebuilt for Capacitor 8.

decisions_this_session.decision: AC6 validation is manual by @qa, not CI/CD
decisions_this_session.rationale: Project has no CI/CD gate. @qa runs git diff --stat app/android/ as first step of qa-gate.
1 GPS point = 1 location callback with lat/lon/accuracy valid. Each [GPS-DIAG] log line counts as 1. Avoids Fernando vs @dev counting differently.

critical_anti_patterns.name: QA PASS without runtime test
critical_anti_patterns.mitigation: Story 1.3 AC7 makes device test a Done gate

critical_anti_patterns.name: Android touched in iOS story
critical_anti_patterns.mitigation: AC6 — @qa runs git diff --stat app/android/ before verdict

critical_anti_patterns.name: git add -A in monorepo
critical_anti_patterns.mitigation: Add files individually by path (uhuru-os sibling has unrelated changes)

next_action: João triggers Codemagic build #29 manually for branch feat/ios-gps-capgo-swap (Sentry fix 89d7e1f incluído — npm ci vai passar agora). Fernando instala via TestFlight e dirige 2-3 min. Logs aparecem em tempo real em sentry.io/issues — João analisa e decide Fase 2.
